name: United Deals  E-Commerce
description: United Deals is a modern electronics e-commerce platform designed to provide a smooth and user-friendly online shopping experience. The website allows users to browse products, explore categories, search and filter items, view detailed product information, and manage their shopping cart through a responsive and modern interface.

name: United Hanger Website
description: A responsive corporate website developed for United Hanger Company to showcase products, company information, and customer inquiries. The website provides a professional online presence with dedicated product pages, image galleries, and contact channels.

name: United Hanger Dashboard
description: United Hanger Dashboard is an administrative dashboard designed to manage products, monitor business operations, and provide a centralized interface for handling company data through a modern and responsive user experience.
